originalTitle: Stock Futures Drift Lower, Oil Rises After Iran Fires Missiles at Israel
summary: Stock futures were dropping, potentially extending the indexes’ selloff on Friday. Oil futures were set to react to new attacks as the Iran war marks its 100th day with no peace deal in sight. Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, S&P 500 futures were down 0.4%, while Nasdaq futures were down 0.3% as were Dow futures.
content: Stock futures were dropping, potentially extending the indexes’ selloff on Friday. Oil futures were set to react to new attacks as the Iran war marks its 100th day with no peace deal in sight. Just after 6 p.m. Eastern time, S&P 500 futures were down 0.4%, while Nasdaq futures were down 0.3% as were Dow futures.
chineseTitle: 伊朗向以色列发射导弹后，股市期货下跌，油价上涨
chineseSummary: 股指期货下跌，可能会延续周五股指的跌势。随着伊朗战争进入第 100 天，且看不到和平协议，石油期货将对新的袭击做出反应。下午 6 点刚过。东部时间，标普 500 指数期货下跌 0.4%，纳斯达克指数期货下跌 0.3%，道指期货也下跌 0.3%。
chineseContent: 股指期货下跌，可能会延续周五股指的跌势。随着伊朗战争进入第 100 天，且看不到和平协议，石油期货将对新的袭击做出反应。下午 6 点刚过。东部时间，标普 500 指数期货下跌 0.4%，纳斯达克指数期货下跌 0.3%，道指期货也下跌 0.3%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
